##RRUFFID=R250065
##IDEAL CHEMISTRY=Na_4_Ca[V_10_O_28_]·20H_2_O
##LOCALITY=West Sunday mine, Slick Rock district, San Miguel County, Colorado, USA
##OWNER=Natural History Museum of Los Angeles County
##SOURCE=Tony Kampf
##DESCRIPTION=Tabular orange-yellow crystals usually stacked into elongate curved multiple crystals. Type sample, originally described in Kampf et al (2011), redefined in Kampf et al (2022)
##STATUS=The identification of this mineral is confirmed by single-crystal X-ray diffraction and chemical analysis
##URL=https://www.rruff.net/odr/rruff_sample/R250065

##DIFFRACTION SAMPLE DESCRIPTION=Single crystal

##FILETYPE=Raman RAW
